name: AI in Zimbabwe
title: AI in Zimbabwe: The what, why, and how
about: Answering the what, why, and how of AI in Zimbabwe.
intro: AI, AI, AI, the new buzzword everywhere. At this points we would be lying to say none of us use AI despite its shortcomings. In this article we get into more detail about AI in Zimbabwe specifically.

name: How to make your first contribution
title: How to make your first contribution on Zim Developers Labs
about: Learn how to contribute to Zim Developers Labs, a platform for Zimbabwean developers. This guide covers the steps to make your first contribution, from signing up to submitting your work.
intro: Making contributions to Zim Developers Labs is your ticket into the executive rank of the community where you get exclusive access and financial benefits. I'm not going to lie to you, even i have to go through the ranking steps which took roughly 3 months to get from New Comer 1 to Contributor 5.
